The '''''Dark Nebula''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that served with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

While preparing to attack a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-aligned [[Star system/Legends|star system]], one of the vessel's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] crashed on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ergeshui/Legends|Ergeshui]], on the continent of [[Ersheg]]. The [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was tracked there by the New Republic embassy and its pilot was captured, however there were no ships available to fight off the Destroyer. An attempt was made to beat the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warship to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], in order to warn the inhabitants.
